events.event_description: Van Brugh Livingston presented credentials as the first U.S. Chargé d'Affaires to Ecuador, establishing the U.S. legation.

evidence.quote: Van Brugh Livingston, Chargé d'Affaires. Appointed: 1848-04-10. Credentials presented: 1848-08-12. Transmitted recall by note 1849-11-12.

events.event_description: The U.S. legation in Ecuador was elevated to an embassy when Boaz Walton Long was promoted to Ambassador Extraordinary and Plenipotentiary and presented credentials.

evidence.quote:
Boaz Walton Long, Envoy Extraordinary and Minister Plenipotentiary. Appointed: 1938-03-22. Credentials presented: 1938-04-29. Promoted to Ambassador Extraordinary and Plenipotentiary 1942-04-14.

Boaz Walton Long, Ambassador Extraordinary and Plenipotentiary. Appointed: 1942-03-05. Credentials presented: 1942-04-14. Left post on 1943-05-01.
